title: Attendance  - Ministry of Education
content:
Te taetae ki te kura
The following Ministry of Education documents have been released in relation to attendance.
- Attendance service national reporting dashboards

## Student attendance #

## Attendance service national reporting dashboards #
For privacy reasons some values have been redacted. In some cases, we have redacted a second value so that we can keep the totals unredacted. Redacting the totals would lessen the value of the release of the dashboards. The values redacted have been redacted under section 9(2)(a) of the Official Information Act 1982 to protect the privacy of natural persons.
